# Elison

Elison is the stage project of Elison Joel Morban, a Dominican Latin R&B artist.

This site is the canonical home for:
- artist bio and current positioning
- the La Banda / CNCO-adjacent backstory
- released music
- official social and streaming links
- booking contact

## Core facts

- In 2015, Elison appeared on La Banda Season 1.
- He performed in front of Ricky Martin, Laura Pausini, and Alejandro Sanz.
- He made the Top 20 but did not make the Top 12.
- A bandmate later won the show and joined CNCO.
- Elison released "Decisions" in 2016.
- After a long quiet stretch, he returned with "LA PRIMERA" in 2025.
- The site positions that return as the current chapter of the artist story.

## Canonical URLs

- Website: https://elisonworld.com/
- Story: https://elisonworld.com/#story
- Music: https://elisonworld.com/#music
- Gallery: https://elisonworld.com/#gallery
- Connect: https://elisonworld.com/#connect
- LA PRIMERA release page: https://elisonworld.com/la-primera/
- Decisions release page: https://elisonworld.com/decisions/
- EPK: https://elisonworld.com/epk/

## Official releases

- Decisions (Remastered): https://music.apple.com/us/album/decisions-remastered-single/1811878413
- LA PRIMERA: https://music.apple.com/us/album/la-primera-remastered-single/1812806221
